title: veronica spicata subsp. spicata
intro: Veronica spicata subsp. spicata, also known as the Spiked Speedwell, is a plant species belonging to the Veronicaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, infections, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Veronica spicata subsp. spicata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Veronica spicata subsp. spicata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, coughs, and fever.
